If we consider Corydalis cava (not Corion rubrum), here is a paragraph about the plant:

Corydalis cava is a perennial plant in the family Papaveraceae, native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including its ability to reduce anxiety and insomnia, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Corydalis cava include capsules, tablets, and teas, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including anxiety and insomnia.
